main.subject: a tall faceted spire of translucent glacial ice with sharp fractured facets and a soft internal cyan glow

background.ground: a windswept polar snowfield of wind-carved drifts and pale blue ice shelves fading into low ground fog

sky.description: deep polar night, a vivid green aurora ribboning overhead, a dense field of cold stars, faint moonlight low on the horizon

interaction.mood: still, reverent nocturne — the spire is discovered, then slowly circled under the lights

camera.direction: low vertical hero shot that rises and arcs gently to the right as you scroll, keeping the spire against the aurora

main_image.prompt: a single tall faceted spire of translucent glacial ice, sharp fractured crystalline facets, soft internal cyan glow, standing vertical, cold rim light, seamless neutral mid-grey studio background, centered, photorealistic, ultra detailed, subsurface scattering, octane render
main_image.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, watermark, text, people, busy background, multiple objects, warm light, daylight, cartoon

background_image.prompt: aerial three-quarter view of a windswept polar snowfield, wind-carved snow drifts, pale blue ice shelves, low drifting ground fog, deep night under faint aurora light, photorealistic arctic terrain, high detail
background_image.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, watermark, text, buildings, people, trees, bright daylight, warm sunlight, cartoon

notes: Deep polar night, not blue hour: timeOfDay 0.97 with a near-black zenith and a cold blue-green palette. The lesson from the soccer scene — a night sky lit by a daytime-strength key reads as two mismatched worlds — is applied here: the ground is lit ONLY by dim, cold sources that agree with the sky, so terrain and hero sit in one nocturne. A soft 11000K moon key at 1.25, a low 8000K aurora rim to echo the overhead ribbon, and a gentle cool fill; exposure held at 1.0 and bloom restrained (0.14 @ 0.76) so nothing blows out. Aurora is the hero of the sky (intensity 1.1, green) with a dense star field (0.5) rendered as fine points. A vertical 3.6m ice spire stands cleanly on the snow; the camera rises from a low hero framing and arcs right over the scroll to sweep the spire across the aurora.
